checks.name: api
findings: No API endpoints found at common paths
No GraphQL endpoint found
No CORS headers — API may not be accessible from browser-based agents
Server always returns HTML regardless of Accept header — no API content negotiation

checks.name: auth
findings: Bot detection systems: DataDome
CAPTCHA detected: recaptcha, captcha
No OAuth/OIDC discovery endpoint found
Login form at /login — no password field (possibly SSO/OAuth only)

checks.name: docs
findings: robots.txt blocks AI bots: gptbot, chatgpt, anthropic, claude
robots.txt references a sitemap
No sitemap.xml found
No OpenAPI/Swagger specification found
Found 1 JSON-LD blocks: WebSite
No llms.txt found (emerging standard for LLM-friendly docs)

checks.name: structure
findings: Heavy div usage: 1460 divs with only 8 semantic elements
Poor accessibility: only 122/240 interactive elements have labels
Forms are well-structured: 1/1 inputs have names
Found 98 elements with stable test selectors
Very little content without JavaScript
Good heading hierarchy: 11 headings, well-structured
40 links with no text or aria-label — invisible to agents
Good link accessibility: 165/205 links are descriptive

checks.name: errors
findings: 404 returns HTML error page (not machine-readable)
No rate limit headers found
Unexpected status 404 for DELETE on main page

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~304,126 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 1% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 35 — deeply nested structure
CSS class attributes consume ~99,233 tokens (33% of page) — utility class bloat
Reading this page costs $0.38–$4.56 per load ($1.90–$22.81 for a 5-page session)
193 internal links — agents may waste tokens exploring

checks.name: a11y
findings: Good landmark coverage: banner, contentinfo, main, navigation, search
1/41 images missing alt text — agents can't understand these images
Found 1 skip link(s) — helps agents jump to main content
Found 4 live region(s) — agents can detect dynamic content changes
5 custom elements made focusable via tabindex=0
10 elements with tabindex=-1 (programmatic focus)

checks.name: performance
findings: Moderate response time: 690ms
Large payload: 1192KB — increases token cost for agents
1 redirect(s) — acceptable
Resource heavy: 36 scripts (heavy JS)
Compression enabled: gzip
